_comment: Copy this file to .claude/launch.json on your machine. .claude/launch.json is git-ignored because the runtimeExecutable path is OS-specific. Pick the configuration that matches your OS and delete the other one.

configurations._os: Windows — uses node.exe directly so it works without `npm` on PATH
configurations.name: Vision360 Dev

configurations._os: macOS / Linux — adjust the node path to match your nvm install (run `which node`)
configurations.name: Vision360 Dev
